summary: Comprehensive testing of Victory AI iteration 2 with Cloudinary integration, AI training partner text changes, and new Victory AI logo. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing confirmed Welcome page shows new logo and 'AI training partner' text, registration flow works, paywall displays correctly, and Train page functions with GPT-4 Vision option.

minor.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization warnings seen in logs but not affecting functionality

passed_tests: Backend API health check
Social proof endpoint returns stats and testimonials
Partner styles endpoint returns 5 styles (tough_love, supportive_mentor, analytical_technician, hype_man, old_school_trainer)
User registration flow
User login/logout flow
Cloudinary signature endpoint returns valid credentials (cloud_name=dtlng3ite, api_key=425519145995724)
Onboarding submit endpoint
Create training partner endpoint
AI feedback generation with training partner name
Training session start/complete flow (no ObjectId in response)
Stripe checkout creates valid Stripe URL
Subscription status endpoint
Welcome page displays new Victory AI logo
Welcome page headline: 'Your AI training partner is waiting.'
Registration form with Google OAuth and email/password options
Onboarding affirmation phase shows social proof stats and testimonials with 'AI training partner' text
Quiz questions (6 questions) auto-advance
Paywall shows Victory AI logo, pricing ($2.99/month, $19.99/year), and training partner info
Train page configuration: Round/Rest duration, Number of rounds, GPT-4 Vision toggle
Training session starts with timer, ROUND indicator, and controls
seed_data_creation: Created test subscription for cloudtest@test.com user to test Train page
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Cloudinary integration is configured correctly. Video analysis uses simulated scores when no video is uploaded (MOCKED - fallback to simulation when Cloudinary upload not performed in browser testing). The test user cloudtest@test.com has an active subscription for testing Train page functionality.
mocked_api_note: Video analysis uses simulated/random scores when actual video analysis is not performed (GPT-4 Vision integration configured but video upload requires actual camera access)
